Description: * REPLACEMENT PERMIT on winchster B4187049** change of contractor to schedule final inspection. See detailed description from controller.Hello Coley, We received your Accela Plan Review Application, R-SF-000673 and it’s actually a change of contractor for a new building permit to schedule final inspections. The issued permit,B4187049 has the insulation inspection passed. Please complete the steps below: • Please complete a Building Permit Application (link below) and email it to this email thread as a PDF. Building Permit Application Link: https://mecknc.widen.net/s/dvf9mkrlr8/buildingform • Please email the approved-stamped drawings as an attached PDF to this email thread. • Please forward the Cancellation Form link to the Homeowner to cancel the issued building permit. Homeowner or GC on the issued permit can cancel the issued permit. The new GC cannot cancel the issued permit. Cancellation Form Link: https://mecknc.widen.net/s/7bt5x7svrm/creditrefundapplicationandadjustment-cancellationform • Once the new building permit is issued, please call-in inspections referencing pervious inspections in “inspection Notes”. The system cannot “transfer” inspections. Once the PDFs are received, a new building permit will be issued in WebPermit. Staff will attach the PDFs to the issued permit. I will cancel the Accela submittal, R-SF-000673. Please give me a call at 980-314-3133 if you have any questions. Thank you, Masika T. Edwards
Project Name: ** REPLACEMENT PERMIT on winchster B4187049** BIRDCO INC
Short Notes: ** REPLACEMENT PERMIT on winchster B4187049** change of contractor to schedule final inspection. See detailed description from controller

Description: Build an open air shed style roof approx. 12’ x 27’ 8” size (room measure post to post/house to post) plus soffit overhangs.  Install standard 24” x 24” x 12” footings to meet code.  Framing to include 6x6 posting, 2x10 or larger headers as needed, 2x6 or 2x8 roof rafters as needed.  LVL bean to avoid center posting.  Trim of posts and headers to be a Miratec brand product.  Ceiling to be a bead board interior standard ceiling with 1” trim between bead board seams.  Soffits, gutters, downspouts, fascia, siding and shingles to match existing home.Construct a custom fireplace using lumber framing finished in a cultured stone with natural stone accents. Fireplace to be approx. 8-9'6'' (varies with porch header) tall x 5' wide

THIS PERMIT IS TO UPFIT BASEMENT IN EXISTING STRUCTURE. PERMIT IS REPLACING B4734619. Previous homeowner completed basement without permits or inspections. We will fix a number of code violations. Install proper fireblocking and firecaulk. Install draftstop. Install insulation r15 up to code. Install arc fault breakers, install tamper resistant receptacles. Staple wires and install new outlets up to code. HVAC includes strapping ducts and also a pressure tests. Vanity drain will be tested along with water lines. Repairs will be made to lines off of the sump pump and installation of a new valve. Minor framing work required for installation of drywall.
Short Notes: Bring basement up to code. Basement was never permited or inspected.
